title: NZ Government API Guidelines 2022
description: Comprehensive government API standards covering business context, security architecture, and technical implementation guidance. Structured in three parts: API concepts and management, API security, and API development. Intended to help NZ government agencies achieve consistent, secure API delivery with recommended practices for REST and other API standards.
